rows.label: xs09030100_MSG0001
rows.name: Ahhh, that was a damn good meal.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs09030100_MSG0002
rows.name:
Good! I thought someone might come,
so I made too much. You saved me![ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs09030100_MSG0003
rows.name:
Yeah? Then next time you have
leftovers, deliver 'em![ST:wait ]
